summary: Sprint 19 — PvP Challenge Engine full test: backend (16/16 pytest) + frontend (all 5 tabs verified). 1v1 buttons in RANK/Hall of Kore, PvPChallengeModal, SFIDE PVP in NEXUS, T.BUTLER pending challenge, anti-cheat validation — all verified and passing.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist (returns 404). No way to get current authenticated user's profile/ID directly. Self-challenge test was skipped due to missing endpoint. API returns user in login response but has no standalone /me route.

react_native_issues.component: KORE tab / DNA tab — STEFANO profile
react_native_issues.issue: STEFANO DNA missing 'agilita' and 'potenza' keys (shows 0 for AGILITA and POTENZA). Pre-existing data gap from seeding — not a code bug, cosmetic only. Noted in iteration_17.

action_items: LOW: Consider adding GET /api/auth/me or GET /api/users/me endpoint to retrieve own user profile including ID — useful for self-challenge validation in tests and frontend
CARRY-OVER MEDIUM: Fix datetime.utcnow() -> datetime.now(timezone.utc) in crew battle endpoints (lines 1249, 1405, 1457) from iteration_17 — intermittent 500 risk
critical_code_review_comments: All PvP endpoints (pvp/challenge, pvp/pending, pvp/challenges/{id}, pvp/challenges/{id}/accept, pvp/challenges/{id}/decline, pvp/challenges/{id}/submit) are working correctly.
Anti-cheat logic in validate_scan_anti_cheat() correctly detects: REP_RATE_TOO_HIGH (reps=100/dur=5 → rate=20 > 1.8), DURATION_TOO_SHORT (5/30 = 0.17 < 0.5) giving score=25 (invalid).
PvPPendingCard correctly shows 'Sfida inviata a T.BUTLER · POWER · 100 XP' in NEXUS console.

verified_features.rank_tab_hall_of_kore_loads: PASS — Hall of Kore loads correctly at /hall. THE GIANTS section (top 3) and THE HUNT section (positions 4-16) visible.
verified_features.1v1_buttons_in_hunt: PASS — 13 red '1v1' buttons visible in THE HUNT section for each athlete row (excluding own row which has no challenge button)
verified_features.pvp_challenge_modal_opens: PASS — Tapping 1v1 opens PvPChallengeModal bottom sheet with SlideInDown animation
verified_features.pvp_modal_content: PASS — Modal shows: SFIDA PVP header, opponent VS YOUR NAME row (AXEL_V LVL 13 · 7,100 XP VS STEFANO LVL 20 · 9,999 XP), 3 discipline cards (POWER/AGILITY/ENDURANCE), 4 stake buttons (50/100/200/500 XP), LANCIA LA SFIDA · 100 XP red CTA button
verified_features.nexus_sfide_pvp_section: PASS — SFIDE PVP section visible in NEXUS console below AZIONI PROATTIVE
verified_features.nexus_tbutler_pending: PASS — 'Sfida inviata a T.BUTLER · POWER · 100 XP' visible as sent challenge in NEXUS SFIDE PVP
verified_features.ghost_session_pvp_trigger: PASS — Navigating to /nexus-trigger?pvpChallengeId=69cc0016c81424e911636f68 auto-triggers ChallengeForge mode (pvpChallenge data fetched, phase set to 'forge')
verified_features.arena_tab_battle_live: PASS — BATTLE LIVE shows SHADOW SQUAD (82.4) vs IRON WOLVES (87.5), 22h remaining, CONTRIBUISCI ORA button
verified_features.arena_tab_matchmaking_ai: PASS — MATCHMAKING AI with IL TUO KORE 82.4, NEXUS ELITE (IN CORSO), IRON WOLVES (IN CORSO)
verified_features.all_5_tabs_no_crash: PASS — ARENA, KORE, NEXUS, DNA, RANK tabs all load without crash
verified_features.backend_pvp_pending_200: PASS — GET /api/pvp/pending returns 200 with sent=[T.BUTLER challenge], received=[], active=[]
verified_features.backend_anti_cheat_rejects_cheat: PASS — reps=100/duration=5 → REP_RATE_TOO_HIGH + DURATION_TOO_SHORT, score=25, valid=False, status=rejected
verified_features.backend_duplicate_challenge_blocked: PASS — Second challenge to T.BUTLER returns 400
verified_features.backend_invalid_discipline_rejected: PASS — POST /pvp/challenge with invalid discipline returns 400

success_rate.frontend: 100% — All 5 tabs, PvPChallengeModal, SFIDE PVP section, T.BUTLER pending, GhostSession trigger all verified

seed_data_creation: None created during this test run. Existing T.BUTLER challenge (ID: 69cc0016c81424e911636f68) was used for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PvP Challenge Engine fully functional and verified. RANK tab (Hall of Kore at /hall) has 1v1 buttons in THE HUNT section. PvPChallengeModal works on 1v1 tap. NEXUS shows SFIDE PVP with T.BUTLER pending challenge. Anti-cheat catches reps=100/dur=5 correctly. All 5 tabs load without crash. One carry-over medium bug: datetime.utcnow() in crew battle endpoints (iteration_17). No /api/me endpoint exists. Tab navigation in web preview: use data-testid='tab-hall' not text='RANK' (ambiguous).
